description: The RSA integration module can be used to allow users who are authenticating to WebSEAL's user registry to use a RSA OTP as a second factor. More information about configuring this mechanism and the correcsponding configuration to integrate with WebSEAL login can be found [here](https://www.ibm.com/docs/en/sva/latest?topic=methods-token-authentication).

server_config.description: The server configuration file to upload.

optional_server_config.description: The server configuration options file to upload.
